Sivasftareeyaa(a)/62/2014 feats 15.12.2016 ATES FART USTs TATA ATT I, aes 4 Ft afeahee far a PETROLEUM AND NATURAL GAS REGULATORY BOARD NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 19th December, 2017 F. No. PNGRB/M(C)/62/2017.—In _ exercise of the powers conferred by section 61 of the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board Act, 2006 (19 of 2006), the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board hereby makes the following regulations, namely:- 1. Short title and commencement. (1) These regulations may be called the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Determination of Petroleum and Petroleum Products Pipeline Transportation Tariff) Amendment Regulations, 2017. (2) They shall come into force on 20th December, 2017. 2. Amendment of regulations 4 and 5. In the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Determination of Petroleum and Petroleum Products Pipeline Transportation Tariff) Regulations, 2010, — (a) in regulation 4, after the fourth proviso, the following proviso shall be added, namely:- “Provided also that the transitional period may, after the completion of the extended transition period of one year, be further extended up to 19.12.2018 or any other period as the Board may decide.” (b) in regulation 5, after the third proviso, the following proviso shall be added, namely:- “Provided further that the determination of the petroleum and petroleum product pipeline transportation tariff shall be benchmarked against the goods tariff table of the railways as applicable on the date of the coming into force of the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Determination of Petroleum and Petroleum Products Pipeline Transportation Tariff) Amendment Regulations, 2017 and if the goods tariff -- 2 of 3 -- Cart WI—-ware 4] FRG Al USA : SAR 3 table of the railways is revised during the further extended period of transition, the Board may consider the benchmarking of the petroleum and petroleum products transportation tariff against such revision.” VANDANA SHARMA, Secy. [ADVT.-II/4/Exty./345/17] Foot Note: Principal regulations were notified vide GSR 987(E) dated 20-12-2010 and subsequently amended vide Gazette of India Extraordinary Part II] Section 4 notification no. F.No. PNGRB/M(C)/62/ 2012 dt 13.12.2012, F. No. PNGRB/M(C)/62/2014 dated 16.12.2014 and F.
